breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where LLM-generated rewards boxes in streaming passthrough were not normalized before persistence, allowing non-standard keys like 'xp'/'gold_pieces' to leak through. The fix adds fallback key handling and removes raw keys after normalization. Naming is excellent with clear variables like raw_xp/raw_gold. Test coverage is comprehensive, verifying actual normalization behavior. Documentation is minimal but explains the WHY for fallback logic.
key_changes: Added fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: xp -> xp_gained, gold_pieces -> gold
Added .pop() calls to remove raw keys after extracting values
Modified _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair to normalize passthrough rewards before returning
Added new E2E test file to verify normalization works with messy keys in streaming passthrough
